jobs.title: SAP Developer
jobs.description:
SAP Developer — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI).

## SAP Developer
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, 6500 Bellinzone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                Si
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    6500 Bellinzone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    SAP Developer
Workload: 100%
SAP Developer
SAP Developer
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone / Meyrin or Biel
Job type: Fixed term
Your tasks
Develop, enhance, and maintain SAP ABAP programs, reports, interfaces, conversions, enhancements, forms, and workflows
Design and implement custom solutions for Finance (FI/CO), Logistics (MM/SD), and Production (PP/QM) modules
Create technical specifications based on functional requirements
Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization
Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for all developments and customizations
Collaborate with functional consultants and business stakeholders
At least 5 years of hands-on SAP ABAP development experience
Proven track record of delivering SAP projects across multiple modules
Your profile
Bachelor degree in Computer science and 5+ years in SAP ABAP programming (Objects, WebDynpro, BAPI, RFC, BADI, User 
Exits) in ECC and S/4HANA
Proficiency in SAP development tools (SE80, SE11, SE38, LSMW, etc.)
Understanding of data dictionary, ALV reporting, and SAP Script/SmartForms/Adobe Forms
CDS (Core Data Services) views development and modelling
Basic knowledge of SAP Cloud Platform Integration infrastructure is an advantage
Basic understanding of SAP Finance modules (FI - Financial Accounting, CO - Controlling), SAP Logistics modules (MM - 
Materials Management, SD - Sales & Distribution), SAP Production modules (PP - Production Planning, QM - Quality 
Management)
Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Strong understanding of incident, problem, change, and release management
Ability to create and maintain process documentation and standard operating procedures
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines.
Learn more...
Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.
Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.
About us
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.
Learn more...
Your contact
Fanny Brault
HR Manager
Web
E-Mail
GF Machining Solutions Management SA
Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8
1217 Losone / Meyrin or Biel
Suisse
Apply now jpidc922526x jpit0519x jpiy26x

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

descriptionByLocale.it: SAP Developer — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## SAP Developer AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, 6500 Bellinzone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: Si Carico di lavoro: 100% 6500 Bellinzone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage SAP Sviluppatore Carico di lavoro: 100% SAP Sviluppatore SAP Workload: 100% Location: Losone / Meyrin or Biel Sviluppare, migliorare e mantenere programmi SAP ABAP, report, interfacce, conversioni, miglioramenti, forme e flussi di lavoro Progettazione e implementare soluzioni personalizzate per Finance (FI/CO), Logistics (MM/SD), e moduli di produzione (PP/QM) Creare specifiche tecniche basate su requisiti funzionali Eseguire recensioni di codici, debugging e ottimizzazione delle prestazioni Creare e mantenere una documentazione tecnica completa per tutti gli sviluppi e personalizzazione Collaborare con consulenti funzionali e stakeholder aziendali Almeno 5 anni di esperienza di sviluppo SAP ABAP Proveniente track record di fornitura di progetti SAP attraverso moduli multipli Il tuo profilo Laurea in Informatica e 5+ anni nella programmazione SAP ABAP (Obiettivi, WebDynpro, BAPI, RFC, BADI, User Exits) in ECC e S/4HANA Proficiency in strumenti di sviluppo SAP (SE80, SE11, SE38, LSMW, ecc.) La comprensione del dizionario dei dati, del reporting ALV e dell'infrastruttura SAP Script/SmartForms/Adobe Forms CDS (Core Data Services) per lo sviluppo e la modellazione La conoscenza di base dell'infrastruttura di integrazione della piattaforma SAP Cloud è un vantaggio La comprensione di base dei moduli SAP Finance (FI - Financial Accounting, CO - Controlling), dei moduli SAP Logistics (MM - Materials Management, SD - Sales & Distribution), dei moduli SAP Production (PP - Production Planning, QM - Quality Management) Capacità di tradurre i requisiti aziendali in soluzioni tecniche Forte comprensione di incidente, problema, cambiamento e gestione del rilascio Capacità di creare e mantenere la documentazione di processo e le procedure operative standard UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e strumenti di precisione e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser e macchine di produzione additive. Ulteriori informazioni... Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche un processo di gestione del talento dedicato (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera. Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo strumenti di apprendimento globali, nonché corsi di formazione e corsi specializzati. Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo insieme per un futuro sostenibile. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e utensili di precisione e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser e macchine di produzione additive. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e soluzioni digitalizzate supportate da servizi e supporto clienti senza rivali. UNITED MACHINING include i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente conta oltre 3'000 dipendenti su oltre 50 siti in tutto il mondo. Ulteriori informazioni... descriptionByLocale.en: SAP Developer — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## SAP Developer AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, 6500 Bellinzone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: Si Carico di lavoro: 100% 6500 Bellinzone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage SAP Developer Workload: 100% SAP Developer SAP Developer Workload: 100% Location: Losone / Meyrin or Biel Job type: Fixed term Your tasks Develop, enhance, and maintain SAP ABAP programs, reports, interfaces, conversions, enhancements, forms, and workflows Design and implement custom solutions for Finance (FI/CO), Logistics (MM/SD), and Production (PP/QM) modules Create technical specifications based on functional requirements Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for all developments and customizations Collaborate with functional consultants and business stakeholders At least 5 years of hands-on SAP ABAP development experience Proven track record of delivering SAP projects across multiple modules Your profile Bachelor degree in Computer science and 5+ years in SAP ABAP programming (Objects, WebDynpro, BAPI, RFC, BADI, User Exits) in ECC and S/4HANA Proficiency in SAP development tools (SE80, SE11, SE38, LSMW, etc.) Understanding of data dictionary, ALV reporting, and SAP Script/SmartForms/Adobe Forms CDS (Core Data Services) views development and modelling Basic knowledge of SAP Cloud Platform Integration infrastructure is an advantage Basic understanding of SAP Finance modules (FI - Financial Accounting, CO - Controlling), SAP Logistics modules (MM - Materials Management, SD - Sales & Distribution), SAP Production modules (PP - Production Planning, QM - Quality Management) Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions Strong understanding of incident, problem, change, and release management Ability to create and maintain process documentation and standard operating procedures UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Learn more... Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together. About us UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Learn more... jobs.description:

AGIE Charmilles SA

                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Teamleitung Elektromontage
Teamleitung Elektromontage
Pensum: 100%
Arbeitsort: Langnau i. E.
Anstellungsart: Unbefristet
Ihre Aufgaben
Verantwortung für die wirtschaftliche Planung und Steuerung der Elektromontage unter Berücksichtigung von Kosten-, 
Qualitäts- und Terminvorgaben
Führung, Entwicklung und Einsatzplanung eines Teams von ca. 6 Mitarbeitenden sowie Betreuung von Lernenden (in 
Automatik)
Planung und Organisation von elektrischen Vor- und Projektmontagen sowie Inbetriebnahmen von Werkzeugmaschinen
Sicherstellung der technischen Qualität inkl. Diagnose, Fehlerbehebung und Erstellung von Arbeitsanweisungen und 
Dokumentationen
Enge Zusammenarbeit und Abstimmung mit angrenzenden Abteilungen (z. B. Produktion, Engineering, CAM) sowie technische 
Ansprechperson für Projekte
Ihr Profil
Abgeschlossene technische Grundausbildung (z. B. in Automatik) mit Weiterbildung auf HF-Stufe
Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in der Elektromontage oder im Maschinenbau, idealerweise mit erster Führungserfahrung
Fundierte Kenntnisse in MS Office und SAP
Strukturierte, selbstständige und wirtschaftlich denkende Persönlichkeit mit hoher Eigeninitiative
Verhandlungssicher in Deutsch, Englisch von Vorteil
ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von 5-Achs-Fräslösungen für die Luft- und Raumfahrt- sowie die 
Energieerzeugungsindustrie. Mit einer starken Kundenorientierung liefert sowohl standardisierte als auch 
massgeschneiderte Lösungen, die auf spezifische Produktionsanforderungen zugeschnitten sind.
Mehr erfahren...
Wir bieten
Ausgezeichnete Karrierechancen: UNITED MACHINING bietet viele Möglichkeiten zur Karriereentwicklung. Wir bieten einen 
Talentmanagementprozess (MyNextBigStep), um Ihre Karriere zu fördern.
Ausgezeichnete Schulungsinstrumente: Bei UNITED MACHINING bieten wir Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten für alle. Wir bieten 
globale Lerntools sowie Schulungen und spezialisierte Kurse.
Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation: Wir haben hohe Nachhaltigkeits- und Innovationsziele. Lassen Sie uns 
gemeinsam auf eine nachhaltige Zukunft hinarbeiten.
Über uns
UNITED MACHINING ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von Komplettlösungen für Hersteller von 
Präzisionskomponenten und Werkzeugen sowie für den Formenbau. Das Portfolio umfasst Maschinen für das Fräsen, die 
Funkenerosion, die Laserstrukturierung, die Lasermikrobearbeitung und die additive Fertigung. Darüber hinaus bietet der 
Geschäftsbereich Spindeln, Automatisierungslösungen, Werkzeuge und digitalisierte Lösungen, die durch einen 
unübertroffenen Kundenservice und Support unterstützt werden.
Zu UNITED MACHINING gehören die Marken AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC und SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING hat seinen Hauptsitz in Biel, Schweiz, und beschäftigt derzeit über 3'000 Mitarbeitende an mehr als 
50 Standorten weltweit.
Mehr erfahren...
Ihre Kontaktperson
Imsand
Talent Acquisition Manager
+41 32 366 11 11
Web
E-Mail
United Machining Mill AG -
Kanalweg 4
3550 Langnau i. E.
Schweiz
Jetzt bewerben jid97cf566x jit0519x jiy26x

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

Metrology Technician 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI).

## Metrology Technician 100%
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone

                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    CH-6616 Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Metrology Technician Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your tasks Perform 
dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring accuracy, 
repeatability, and compliance with quality standards. Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, 
Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments (Calypso, Quindos). Define, optimize, and standardize measurement 
programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO GPS standards. Analyze measurement results, 
support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R\&D to ensure robust inspection processes. 
Manage and continuously improve inspection\-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup. Your profile Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent 
background. At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD\&T 
certification is a plus. Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement 
standards. Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills. Fluent in Italian; 
English B1\. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and 
innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM. Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold 
making and the production of high\-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career 
opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent 
management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide 
development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. 
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable 
future together. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision 
components and tools manufacturers and the mold\-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, 
laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, 
tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the 
brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, 
Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Your contact Mollar HR Business Partner 
\+41 91 806 90 30 Web E\-Mail Agie Charmilles SA, Losone Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Apply now jid2172a04jm 
jit0519jm jiy26jm

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

descriptionByLocale.it: Metrology Technician 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Metrology Technician 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% CH-6616 Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Metrology Technician Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Tipo di lavoro: Unlimited Eseguire misurazioni dimensionali e funzionali principalmente all'interno dell'area di ispezione e test finale, garantendo precisione, ripetibilità e conformità agli standard di qualità. Eseguire misurazioni utilizzando sistemi di metrologia avanzati (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) e relativi ambienti software (Calypso, Quindos). Definire, ottimizzare e standardizzare i programmi di misura e i metodi di ispezione in linea con la metodologia AUKOM e gli standard GPS ISO. Analizza i risultati delle misurazioni, supporta l'analisi delle cause root e collabora con Quality, Production e R\&D per garantire processi di ispezione robusti. Gestire e migliorare continuamente i processi di misura, la documentazione e le attività di calibrazione relativi all'ispezione, contribuendo all'evoluzione della configurazione della metrologia. Il tuo profilo Grado tecnico in background meccanico o equivalente. Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in un laboratorio di metrologia o in un ambiente di misura di qualità. La certificazione AUKOM GD\&T è un plus. Forte conoscenza dei processi di misura dimensionale, dei sistemi di calibrazione e degli standard di misura. Analitico, organizzato e autonomo, con forti capacità di collaborazione e coordinamento. Fluente in italiano; l'inglese B1\. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), è conosciuto come un marchio premium e leader di innovazione in filo, die\-sinking, e hole\-drilling EDM. Le sue soluzioni di automazione\-ready sono utilizzate nella produzione di stampi e nella produzione di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere. Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche un processo di gestione del talento dedicato (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera. Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo strumenti di apprendimento globali, nonché corsi di formazione e corsi specializzati. Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo insieme per un futuro sostenibile. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e utensili di precisione e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser e macchine di produzione additive. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e soluzioni digitalizzate supportate da servizi e supporto clienti senza rivali. UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente conta oltre 3'000 dipendenti su oltre 50 siti in tutto il mondo. Il vostro contatto Mollar HR Business Partner \+41 91 806 90 30 Web E\-Mail Agie Charmilles SA, Losone Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Applicare ora jid2172a04jm jit0519jm jiy26jm

                                    Software Engineer Expert \- R\&D Software Engineer Expert – R\&D Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited 
Your tasks Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards. 
Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a core 
requirement for geometric processing in EDM software. Interface with Real\-Time \& PLC teams to define, validate, and 
improve new functionalities. Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews. 
Participate in technical workshops, cross\-team validations, and support knowledge\-sharing across engineering teams. 
Your profile Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field. Proven 
experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years. Strong background in Object\-Oriented architecture, 
UML, and OO programming (C\# / .NET); experience in HMI development (WPF / XAML). Good understanding of the full 
software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies. Structured, autonomous, and 
collaborative working style; customer\-oriented and resilient under pressure. Fluent in English and Italian. AGIE 
CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in 
wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM. Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high\-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career opportunities: UNITED 
MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process 
(MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development 
opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Sustainability 
and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future 
together. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and 
tools manufacturers and the mold\-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser 
micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, 
and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE 
CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, 
and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Your contact Mollar HR Business Partner \+41 91 806 
90 30 Web E\-Mail Agie Charmilles SA, Losone Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Apply now jid8a0b1b6jm jit0519jm jiy26jm

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

Confortevoli sfide matematiche e algoritmiche, in particolare nella geometria 3D analitica — un nucleo requisito per la lavorazione geometrica nel software EDM. Interfaccia con i team Real\-Time \& PLC per definire, convalidare e migliorare nuove funzionalità. Assicurare la qualità del software attraverso test, documentazione e recensioni di codice strutturate. Forte sfondo in architettura Object\-Oriented, Programmazione UML e OO (C\# / .NET); esperienza nello sviluppo HMI (WPF / XAML). Buona comprensione della piena sviluppo software ciclo di vita, garanzia di qualità e metodologie Agile / Scrum. Strutturato, autonomo e stile di lavoro collaborativo; cliente orientato e resiliente sotto pressione. Fluente in inglese e italiano. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), è conosciuto come un marchio premium e leader dell'innovazione filo, die\-sinking, e foro\-drilling EDM. Le sue soluzioni di automazione\-ready sono utilizzate nella fabbricazione di stampi e nella produzione di componenti di fascia alta, che offrono precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere. Lavoriamo per un futuro sostenibile insieme. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per componenti di precisione e produttori di strumenti e l'industria di stampa. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, laser macchine di produzione micromachining e additive. UNITED MACHINING umfasst die Marken AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC und SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING hat seinen Hauptsitz in Biel, Schweiz und beschäftigt derzeit über 3'000 Mitarbeiter an über 50 Standorten weltweit. descriptionByLocale.fr: Ingénieur logiciel Expert - R&D 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Bienne (TI). ## Expert en génie logiciel - R-D 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone Aucune Angestellte (Schweiz) Aucune Angestellte (mondiale) Temporaneo: Numéro Carico di lavoro: 100 % CH-6616 Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Page d'accueil Expert en génie logiciel \- R\&D Expert en génie logiciel – R\&D Charge de travail: 100% Lieu: Losone Type de travail: illimité Vos tâches Développez et maintenez des logiciels HMI adaptés aux exigences des machines EDM et aux standards d'expérience utilisateur. Gestion confortable des défis mathématiques et algorithmiques complexes, en particulier dans la géométrie analytique 3D — un noyau l'exigence de traitement géométrique dans le logiciel EDM. Interface avec les équipes Real\-Time \& PLC pour définir, valider et améliorer les nouvelles fonctionnalités. Assurer la qualité des logiciels au moyen de tests, de documentation et d'examens de codes structurés. Participer à des ateliers techniques, à des validations inter-équipes et appuyer le partage des connaissances entre les équipes d'ingénierie. Votre profil Maîtrise en génie informatique, informatique ou domaine technique équivalent. Prouvé expérience dans les environnements logiciels industriels, au moins 3 ans. Un fond solide dans l'architecture orientée objet, UML et programmation OO (C\# / .NET); expérience en développement HMI (WPF / XAML). Bonne compréhension de la pleine le cycle de vie du développement logiciel, l'assurance de la qualité et les méthodologies Agile / Scrum. Structured, autonome, et style de travail collaboratif; orienté client et résilient sous pression. Fluent en anglais et italien. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventeur d'EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), est connu comme une marque haut de gamme et leader de l'innovation dans Le fil, l'enroulement et l'EDM. Ses solutions d'automatisation sont utilisées dans la fabrication de moules et la production de composants haut de gamme, offrant une précision, une fiabilité et des performances suisses. Grandes opportunités de carrière: UNITED MACHINING offre de nombreuses possibilités de croissance de carrière. Nous offrons également un processus dédié de gestion des talents (MyNextBigStep) pour stimuler votre carrière. Excellents outils d'apprentissage: Chez UNITED MACHINING nous fournissons le développement des opportunités pour tout le monde. Nous offrons des outils d'apprentissage mondiaux ainsi que des formations et des cours spécialisés. Durabilité et l'innovation: Nous avons des objectifs de durabilité et d'innovation élevés. Travaillons vers un avenir durable ensemble. UNITED MACHINING est l'un des principaux fournisseurs mondiaux de solutions complètes pour les composants de précision et les fabricants d'outils et l'industrie de la fabrication de moules. La gamme comprend fraisage, EDM, texturation laser, laser machines de micro-usinage et de fabrication additive. En outre, la division offre broches, l'automatisation, l'outillage, et des solutions numériques soutenues par des services et un support clients inégalés. MACHINING UNIQUE comprend les marques AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, ÉTAPE TEC et SYSTÈME 3R. UNITED MACHINING a son siège social à Biel, Suisse, et compte actuellement plus de 3'000 employés sur plus de 50 sites dans le monde.
